code: import axios from'axios';const API_BASE=process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'https://soldikeeper-backend-production.up.railway.app/api';const apiClient=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE,timeout:30000,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});apiClient.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('adminToken');if(token)config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);return config;});apiClient.interceptors.response.use(response=>response,error=>{var _error$response;if(((_error$response=error.response)===null||_error$response===void 0?void 0:_error$response.status)===401){localStorage.removeItem('adminToken');window.location.href='/login';}return Promise.reject(error);});export default apiClient;
